title: S.A.M
description: This is a resource pack that contains swords, staves, hats, accessories and much more.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/034190590202c010d5eb82d98bcc9988caeb0678.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### This is a S.A.M. resource pack for renaming things thanks to the anvil. Then, you can see the categories that are in the Totems, Swords and Axes, Hats resource packs, in which there will be pictures that will show the item that you can get, as well as the name that needs to be written in the anvil. Not everything can be written in the anvil items, but only those listed. To use the resource pack you need to download optifine or CIT Resewn.

### FORGE [https://optifine.net/downloads](https://optifine.net/downloads)

### FABRIC [https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)


</details>


![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01cbf3fe584b394fcd67f99c9ecf97241a24915.png)
